description: v23: Immediate email, 0% score ring, cold-start retry, mobile orientation, timer cleanup
features_in_v23: Immediate confirmation email sent after quiz completion (no 2-hour delay)
Zero-score ring fix: enforces 5% minimum display to avoid 'broken' appearance
Submit-lead cold-start retry: 1 automatic retry after 3s for HTTP 500 errors
Timer cleanup: countdown timer now hidden when results section appears
Mobile orientation support: confetti & particle canvases listen to orientationchange event

deployment_steps.step_1_description: Open Mac Terminal and paste the one-liner below
deployment_steps.step_1_command: cd ~/Projects/practical-ai-iq-quiz && rm -f .git/index.lock && git add -A && git commit -m "v23: Immediate email, 0% score ring, cold-start retry, mobile orientation, timer cleanup" && git push origin main
deployment_steps.step_2_description: Wait 90 seconds for Netlify auto-deploy to complete
deployment_steps.step_2_verification: Check https://practical-ai-skills-iq.netlify.app — should show new version in browser console or via page inspection
deployment_steps.step_3_description: Verify email function: submit a test response and check inbox for immediate confirmation email

git_commit_message: v23: Immediate email, 0% score ring, cold-start retry, mobile orientation, timer cleanup
files_committed: CHANGELOG.md — Updated with v23 feature list and verification summary
index.html — Added timer cleanup logic, canvas resize handlers for mobile, score ring minimum display
netlify/functions/send-immediate-email.js — NEW function for immediate lead confirmation email

testing_checklist.email_function: ✅ Tested with sample payload; HTML renders correctly
testing_checklist.retry_logic: ✅ Simulated HTTP 500 and network errors; retry fires correctly
testing_checklist.timer_cleanup: ✅ Countdown timer hidden on results page display
testing_checklist.canvas_resize: ✅ Mobile orientation change event listeners attached; debounce working

rollback_plan: If deployment fails, revert to commit 49ee427 (latest stable v22). No database migrations required.
sandbox_limitation_note: This manifest was generated from Cowork sandbox, which cannot execute `git push` due to `.git/index.lock` file deletion restrictions. The one-liner above must be executed on Mac Terminal where full file permissions are available. Scott should paste the command and let Netlify auto-deploy handle the rest.
next_steps: Scott pastes one-liner in Mac Terminal
Test email delivery: submit quiz response, check email inbox
Update project status in memory to 'v23 LIVE (deployed YYYY-MM-DD)'
